zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha Stanley於大約1408年出生在英國爾胡頓時，她的父親Sir William de Stanley IV41歲，母親Margery de Hooton46歲。她於1427年與Thomas Venables在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她在英國英格蘭爾金德頓被列為baroness of kinderton。她去世於大約1510年在英國爾金德頓享年104歲，埋葬在英國爾金德頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaretha Stanley于大约1408年出生在英国爾胡頓时，她的父亲Sir William de Stanley IV41岁，母亲Margery de Hooton46岁。她于1427年与Thomas Venables在英国爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她在英国英格兰爾金德頓被列为baroness of kinderton。她去世于大约1510年在英国爾金德頓享年104岁，埋葬在英国爾金德頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha Stanley was born about 1408, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir William de Stanley IV, was 41 and her mother, Margery de Hooton, was 46. She married Thomas Venables in 1427, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. Her occupation is listed as baroness of kinderton in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She died about 1510, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 104, and was buried in Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaretha Stanley est née environ 1408, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Stanley IV, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margery de Hooton, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Venables en 1427, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. La profession de sa indiquée est baroness of kinderton à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée environ 1510, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 104 ans, et a été enterrée à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha Stanley um 1408 in Hooton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Stanley IV 41 und ihre Mutter Margery de Hooton 46. Sie hat 1427 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England Thomas Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. ihr Beruf ist als baroness of kinderton in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Sie starb um 1510 im Alter von 104 Jahren in Kinderton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Kinderton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Stanley è nata il circa 1408 nel Hooton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Stanley IV, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margery de Hooton, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Venables nel 1427, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come baroness of kinderton nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì circa 1510, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 104 anni, e fu sepolta a Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha Stanleyが約1408年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Stanley IVは41歳，母Margery de Hootonは46歳であった。1427年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでThomas Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでの職業はbaroness of kindertonと記録されている。彼女は約1510年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで104歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha Stanley(이)가 대략 1408년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Stanley IV(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Hooton(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Thomas Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 baroness of kinderton이었다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 104세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 킨더턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Stanley nasceu aproximadamente 1408, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Stanley IV, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Hooton, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Venables em 1427, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como baroness of kinderton em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1510, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 104 anos, e foi sepultada em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha Stanley родилась около 1408 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Stanley IV было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margery de Hooton, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Venables в 1427 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.  Она работала по профессии baroness of kinderton в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла около 1510 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 104 лет и была похоронена в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия.

sm.about 1408–about 1510: e tusa o le 1408–e tusa o le 1510

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaretha Stanley nació aproximadamente 1408, en Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Stanley IV, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margery de Hooton, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Thomas Venables en 1427, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era baroness of kinderton en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió aproximadamente 1510, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 104 años, y fue sepultada en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
